line_description: Mixed line containing Tengri-style script characters in three quoted groups plus a final unquoted group of three words, alongside the Latin uppercase phrase 'I CAN READ' in the middle.

vision_glyph.description: First quoted group of Tengri-style glyphs; bold, geometric forms resembling stylized resh/alef/lamed/heh-like shapes, possibly rendering 'SHANGDI' in Tengri script
Second quoted group of Tengri-style glyphs; slightly wider, possibly rendering 'SHADDAI'
Third quoted group of Tengri-style glyphs; shorter, possibly rendering 'DINGIR' or 'TENGERE'

unmatched_vision_glyphs.description: Unquoted Tengri-style word group after Latin text; bold geometric glyphs
Second unquoted Tengri-style word group; similar bold geometric forms
Final Tengri-style word group at end of line; bold geometric forms

schmeh_hint: Line 11: latin -> SHANGDI", "SHADDAI", "DINGIR" OR "TENGERE" ARE SO
